heroSubtitle: Hands-on training for the tools transforming clinical documentation. We train your clinicians to use Nuance DAX and Sunio by eClinicalWorks effectively from day one.

items.name: Nuance DAX
items.description: Ambient clinical documentation that listens to patient encounters and generates clinical notes automatically. We train providers on workflow integration, note review, and optimization for maximum documentation quality.

items.name: Sunio / eCW
items.description: Ambient documentation built into the eClinicalWorks EHR. We help your providers adopt Sunio and integrate it into their existing eCW workflows for seamless documentation.

formats.title: Training
formats.subtitle: Training designed around your go-live timeline.

items.title: Webinars
items.description: Introductory sessions that build awareness and set expectations before your rollout.

items.title: Virtual Workshops
items.description: Remote hands-on training for providers, walking through real encounter scenarios with the tool.

items.title: In-Person Workshops
items.description: On-site, elbow-to-elbow training during go-live. The most effective format for clinical adoption.

items.title: Coaching
items.description: Post-go-live coaching that reinforces best practices and drives sustained adoption across your provider teams.

ctaSubtitle: Let's make sure your providers are ready from day one.
